TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Bilus = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Bilus. 19 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 33 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 27 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 6 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 76%, Amis 3%, ni rahuq na o 3%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = bilus = gaga mniq tawjuənsu *usiŋʦju ka alaŋ bilus. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Bilus = Gaga mniq Tawyuensu Fusingcyu ka alang Bilus. 19 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 33 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 27 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 6 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 76%, Amis 3%, ni rahuq na o 3%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = bilus = gaga mniq tawjuənsu *usiŋʦju ka alaŋ bilus. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal **%, amis *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pnjaħan pnatas
